ActivityDataLineType.description: A class to associate a time period and locations (activity data) with an item for inventory planning purposes.

ActivityPropertyType.description: A class to define a name/value pair for a property of an inventory planning activity.

AddressLineType.description: A class to define an unstructured address line.

AddressType.description: A class to define common information related to an address.

AirTransportType.description: A class to identify a specific aircraft used for transportation.

AllowanceChargeType.description: A class to describe information about a charge or discount as applied to a price component.

AnnotationType.description: A class to define a structured annotation providing contextual or explanatory information related to a document or other business object

AppealTermsType.description: A class to describe the terms and conditions, set by the contracting authority, under which an appeal can be lodged for a tender award.

AttachmentType.description: A class to describe an attached document. An attachment can refer to an external document or be included with the document being exchanged.

AttestationLineType.description: A class describing an attestation line

AttestationType.description: A class describing an attestation made for an item

AuctionTermsType.description: A class to describe the terms to be fulfilled by tenderers if an auction is to be executed before the awarding of a tender.

AuthorizationType.description: A class to define an authorization that as been issued

AwardingCriterionResponseType.description: Defines the response for an awarding criterion from the tendering party.

AwardingCriterionType.description: A class to define a criterion from the contracting party that will be taken into account when awarding a contract. An awarding criterion can be objective, when it can be evaluated following a formula, or subjective, when human analysis is required.

AwardingTermsType.description: A class to define the terms for awarding a contract.

BallastWaterSummaryType.description: A class to summarize the ballast water management of a vessel.

BallastWaterTransactionType.description: A class to define a ballast water transaction, such as the uptake, exchange or discharge of ballast water.

BillingReferenceLineType.description: A class to define a reference to a transaction line in a billing document.

BillingReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to a billing document.

BranchType.description: A class to describe a branch or a division of an organization.

BudgetAccountLineType.description: A class to define a budget account line.

BudgetAccountType.description: A class to define a budget account.

BuyerAssignedReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference provided by the buyer for internal routing or classification.

CapabilityType.description: A class to describe a specific capability of an organization.

CardAccountType.description: A class to define a credit card, debit card, or charge card account.

CashRegisterType.description: A class to define the cash register used in a commercial transaction.

CatalogueItemSpecificationUpdateLineType.description: A class to define a line describing the transaction that updates the specification of an item in a catalogue.

CatalogueLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Catalogue describing a purchasable item.

CataloguePricingUpdateLineType.description: A class to define a line describing a pricing update to a catalogue line.

CatalogueReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to a catalogue.

CatalogueRequestLineType.description: A class to define a line describing a request for a catalogue line.

CertificateOfOriginApplicationType.description: A class to define an application for a Certificate of Origin (CoO).

CertificateType.description: A class to define a certificate applied to the item. Certificated can be a requirement to sell goods or services in a jurisdiction.

CircularityProfileType.description: A class to describe circular economy-related properties of a product, including its resource efficiency, reusability, repairability, and end-of-life treatment.

ClassificationCategoryType.description: A class to define a category within a classification scheme.

ClassificationSchemeType.description: A class to define a classification scheme, such as a taxonomy for classifying goods or services.

ClauseType.description: A class to define a clause (a distinct article or provision) in a contract, treaty, will, or other formal or legal written document requiring compliance.

CommodityClassificationType.description: A class to describe the classification of a commodity.

CommunicationType.description: A class to describe a means of communication.

CompletedTaskType.description: A class to describe the completion of a specific task in the tendering process.

ConditionType.description: A class to define a measurable condition of an object.

ConsignmentType.description: A class to describe an identifiable collection of one or more goods items to be transported between the consignor and the consignee. This information may be defined within a transport contract. A consignment may comprise more than one shipment (e.g., when consolidated by a freight forwarder).

ConsumptionAverageType.description: A class to define an average consumption as a monetary amount.

ConsumptionCorrectionType.description: The Statement of correction, for examples heating correction.

ConsumptionHistoryType.description: A class to describe the measurement of a type of consumption during a particular period, used for the subscriber to get an overview of his consumption

ConsumptionLineType.description: A class to describe a line item for utility consumption. To specify more than one utility item, use separate consumption lines.

ConsumptionPointType.description: A class to define the point of consumption for a utility, such as a meter.

ConsumptionReportReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to an earlier consumption report (e.g., last year's consumption).

ConsumptionReportType.description: A class to describe utility consumption, including details of the environment in which consumption takes place.

ConsumptionType.description: A class to describe the consumption of a utility.

ContactType.description: A class to describe a contactable person or department in an organization.

ContractExecutionRequirementType.description: A class to describe a requirement for execution of a contract.

ContractExtensionType.description: A class to describe possible extensions to a contract.

ContractType.description: A class to describe a contract.

ContractingActivityType.description: The nature of the type of business of the organization.

ContractingPartyType.description: A class to describe an individual, a group, or a body having a procurement role in a tendering process.

ContractingPartyTypeType.description: The type of contracting party that is independent of its role.

ContractingRepresentationTypeType.description: The type of representation the party has acting for the Contracting party

ContractingSystemType.description: A class to describe the contracting system. If the procedure is individual (nonrepetitive), this class ought not be used.

CorporateRegistrationSchemeType.description: A class to describe a scheme for corporate registration.

CountryType.description: A class to describe a country.

CreditAccountType.description: A class to identify a credit account for sales on account.

CreditNoteLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Credit Note or Self Billed Credit Note.

CrewPersonEffectType.description: A class describing the effect or belonging of a Crew Person

CustomerPartyType.description: A class to describe a customer party.

CustomsDeclarationType.description: A class describing identifiers or references relating to customs procedures.

DebitNoteLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Debit Note.

DeclarationType.description: A class to describe a declaration by an economic operator of certain characteristics or capabilities in fulfilment of requirements specified in a call for tenders.

DeliveryChannelType.description: A class to describe a delivery channel.

DeliveryTermsType.description: A class for describing the terms and conditions applying to the delivery of goods.

DeliveryType.description: A class to describe a delivery.

DeliveryUnitType.description: A class to describe a delivery unit.

DependentPriceReferenceType.description: A class to define the price of an item as a percentage of the price of a different item.

DespatchLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Despatch Advice.

DespatchType.description: A class to describe the despatching of goods (their pickup for delivery).

DigitalAgreementTermsType.description: A class to describe the terms and conditions of a digital agreement.

DigitalCollaborationType.description: A class to describe a digital trade collaboration.

DigitalProcessType.description: A class to describe a digital trade process.

DigitalServiceType.description: A class to describe a specific digital trade service supported by an organization for either sending or receiving business documents on different formats (e.g. UBL, ISO20022, EDIFACT, ...).

DimensionType.description: A class to define a measurable dimension (length, mass, weight, volume, or area) of an item.

DocumentDistributionType.description: A class to describe the distribution of a document to an interested party.

DocumentMetadataType.description: A class to describe the metadata of a specific business document based on any document format (e.g. UBL, EDIFACT, ...).

DocumentReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to a document.

DocumentResponseType.description: A class to describe an application-level response to a document.

DutyType.description: The charging rate used for both call charging and time dependent charging

EconomicOperatorPartyType.description: A class to describe a potential contractor, supplier and service provider responding to a tender.

EconomicOperatorRoleType.description: A class to describe the tenderer contracting role.

EconomicOperatorShortListType.description: A class to provide information about the preselection of a short list of economic operators for consideration as possible candidates in a tendering process.

ElectronicAddressType.description: A class to describe an Electronic Address where a Party is registered on a given exchange network.

EmissionCalculationMethodType.description: A class to define how an environmental emission is calculated.

EncryptionCertificatePathChainType.description: Details of a certificate path chain used in encryption.

EncryptionSymmetricAlgorithmType.description: Details of a symmetric algorithm used in encryption.

EndOfLifeTreatmentType.description: A class to describe how an entity is expected to be treated at the end of its lifecycle, including treatment pathway, processing type, location, and environmental considerations.

EndorsementType.description: A class to describe an endorsement of a document.

EndorserPartyType.description: A class to describe the party endorsing a document.

EnergyConsumptionAllocationType.description: A class to describe an allocation of energy consumption and its associated environmental emissions

EnergyTaxReportType.description: A class to describe energy taxes.

EnergyWaterSupplyType.description: A class to describe the supply (and therefore consumption) of an amount of energy or water.

EnvironmentalEmissionType.description: A class to describe an environmental emission.

EvaluationCriterionType.description: A class defining the required criterion for a tenderer to be elligible in a tendering process.

EventCommentType.description: A class to define comments about a retail event.

EventLineItemType.description: A class to define a line item describing the expected impacts associated with a retail event involving a specific product at a specific location.

EventTacticEnumerationType.description: A class to define a set of codes that describes a retail tactic.

EventTacticType.description: A class defining a specific type of action or situation arranged by the Buyer or the Seller to promote the product or products.

EventType.description: A class to describe a significant occurrence relating to an object, process, or person.

EvidenceType.description: A class to describe an item of evidentiary support for representations of capabilities or the ability to meet tendering requirements, which an economic operator must provide for acceptance into a tendering process.

ExceptionCriteriaLineType.description: A class to define a line in an ExceptionCriteria document that specifies a threshold for forecast variance, product activity, or performance history, the exceeding of which will trigger an exception message.

ExceptionNotificationLineType.description: A class to define a line in an Exception Notification.

ExchangeRateType.description: A class to define an exchange rate.

ExternalReferenceType.description: A class to describe an external object, such as a document stored at a remote location.

FeeType.description: A class to describe a revenue.

FinancialAccountType.description: A class to describe a financial account.

FinancialGuaranteeType.description: A class to describe the bond guarantee of a tenderer or bid submitter's actual entry into a contract in the event that it is the successful bidder.

FinancialInstitutionType.description: A class to describe a financial institution.

ForecastExceptionCriterionLineType.description: Establishes the criterion for one of the three types of exceptions. This class provides criteria for the kind of forecast exception, the identification of the purpose of the forecast, the source of data and the time basis criterion for the exception.

ForecastExceptionType.description: As explained in Exception Criteria Line: Three types of exception criteria can be defined, Operational, Metric or Forecast Exceptions. This class provides criteria for forecast exception type: the identification of the purpose of the forecast, the source of data and the time basis criteria for the exception.

ForecastLineType.description: Detailed information about a particular Forecast Line within a Forecast Document

ForecastRevisionLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Forecast Revision describing a revision to a line in a Forecast.

FrameworkAgreementType.description: A class to describe a tendering framework agreement.

FuelConsumptionType.description: A class to describe fuel consumption.

FuelMeteringType.description: A class to describe fuel metering.

FuelPropertyType.description: A class to describe a fuel property.

GoodsItemContainerType.description: A class defining how goods items are split across transport equipment.

GoodsItemPassportCounterfoilType.description: A class describing a Goods Item Passport or ATA Carnet Counterfoil

GoodsItemType.description: A class to describe a separately identifiable quantity of goods of a single product type.

GoodsProcessingType.description: A class to describe the processing of goods and products

HazardousGoodsTransitType.description: A class to describe hazardous goods in transit.

HazardousItemType.description: A class to describe a hazardous item.

ISPSRequirementsType.description: A class to describe a set of ISPS Requirements.

ImmobilizedSecurityType.description: A class to describe an immobilized security to be used as a guarantee.

InstructionForReturnsLineType.description: A class to define a line in an Instruction for Returns.

InsurancePolicyType.description: A class to define an insurance policy.

InterestRateType.description: A class to describe an interest rate applied to a monetary amount over a defined period.

InventoryReportLineType.description: A class to define a line in an Inventory Report.

InvoiceLineType.description: A class to define a line in an Invoice.

ItemComparisonType.description: A class to provide information about price and quantity of an item for use in price comparisons based on price, quantity, or measurements.

ItemIdentificationType.description: A class for assigning identifying information to an item.

ItemInformationRequestLineType.description: A class to define a line in an Item Information Request asking a trading partner for item information.

ItemInstanceType.description: A class to describe a specific, trackable instance of an item.

ItemLocationQuantityType.description: A class for information about pricing structure, lead time, delivery, and location associated with an item.

ItemManagementProfileType.description: A class to define a management profile for an item.

ItemPropertyGroupType.description: A class to describe a property group or classification.

ItemPropertyRangeType.description: A class to describe a range of values for an item property.

ItemPropertyType.description: A class to describe a specific property of an item.

ItemType.description: A class to describe an item of trade. It includes a generic description applicable to all examples of the item together with optional subsidiary descriptions of any number of actual instances of the type.

LanguageType.description: A class to describe a language.

LegislationType.description: A class to describe a reference to a piece of legislation.

LineItemType.description: A class to describe a line item.

LineReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to a line in a document.

LineResponseType.description: A class to describe responses to a line in a document.

LocationCoordinateType.description: A class for defining a set of geographical coordinates (apparently misnamed).

LocationType.description: A class to describe a location.

LotDistributionType.description: A class defining how to treat different lots in a single procurement.

LotIdentificationType.description: A class for defining a lot identifier (the identifier of a set of item instances that would be used in case of a recall of that item).

LotsGroupType.description: A class for defining set of lots.

MaritimeHealthDeclarationType.description: A class to desccribe a maritime health declaration.

MaritimeTransportType.description: A class to describe a vessel used for transport by water (including sea, river, and canal).

MaritimeWasteType.description: A class to describe a transaction of maritime waste.

MessageDeliveryType.description: A class to describe how a message is delivered (routed).

MeterPropertyType.description: The name of this meter property.

MeterReadingType.description: A class to describe a meter reading.

MeterType.description: A class to describe a meter and its readings.

MiscellaneousEventType.description: A class to describe a miscellaneous event associated with a retail event.

MonetaryTotalType.description: A class to define a monetary total.

NoticeSubTypeType.description: A class to define a Notice Subtype

NotificationRequirementType.description: A class to describe a notification requirement.

OnAccountPaymentType.description: A scheduled prepayment (on-account payment) for a estimated utility consumption

OperationTypeType.description: A class to define the type of operation

OrderLineReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to an order line.

OrderLineType.description: A class to define a line in an order document (e.g., Order, Order Change, or Order Response) describing an item being ordered.

OrderReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to an Order.

OrderedShipmentType.description: A class to describe an ordered shipment.

PackageType.description: A class to describe a package.

ParticipantPartyType.description: A class to describe a participant party.

PartyGroupType.description: A class to define a Group of Parties

PartyIdentificationType.description: A class to define an identifier for a party.

PartyLegalEntityType.description: A class to describe a party as a legal entity.

PartyNameType.description: A class for defining the name of a party.

PartyTaxSchemeType.description: A class to describe a taxation scheme applying to a party.

PartyType.description: A class to describe an organization, sub-organization, or individual fulfilling a role in a business process.

PaymentMandateType.description: A class to describe a payment mandate.

PaymentMeansType.description: A class to describe a means of payment.

PaymentTermsType.description: A class to describe a set of payment terms.

PaymentType.description: A class to describe a payment.

PerformanceDataLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Performance History.

PeriodType.description: A class to describe a period of time.

PersonType.description: A class to describe a person.

PersonnelHealthIncidentType.description: A class to describe a health incident involving crew or other personnel.

PhysicalAttributeType.description: A class to describe a physical attribute.

PickupType.description: A class to describe a pickup for delivery.

PortCallPurposeType.description: A class to describe the purpose of a port call.

PortCallRecordType.description: A record for a ship call at a port facility.

PortCallType.description: A class to describe a call to a port.

PostAwardProcessType.description: A class to describe a post award process. These processes following the agreement on a contract for supply of goods or services ( for example, after the awarding of a tender).

PowerOfAttorneyType.description: A class to describe a power of attorney.

PriceExtensionType.description: A class to describe a price extension, calculated by multiplying the price per unit by the quantity of items.

PriceListType.description: A class to describe a price list.

PriceType.description: A class to describe a price, expressed in a data structure containing multiple properties (compare with UnstructuredPrice).

PricingReferenceType.description: A reference to the basis for pricing. This may be based on a catalogue or a quoted amount from a price list and include some alternative pricing conditions.

PrizeType.description: A class to describe something valuable offered or striven for in competition.

ProcessJustificationType.description: A class to describe a justification for the choice of tendering process.

ProcurementAdditionalTypeType.description: A class to describe additional types for a procurement project

ProcurementProjectLotReferenceType.description: A class to reference to a lot identifier.

ProcurementProjectLotType.description: A class to describe one of the parts of a procurement project that is being subdivided to allow the contracting party to award different lots to different economic operators under different contracts.

ProcurementProjectType.description: A class to describe a project to procure goods, works, or services.

ProjectReferenceType.description: A class to define a reference to a procurement project.

PromotionalEventLineItemType.description: A class to describe a line item associated with a promotional event.

PromotionalEventType.description: Agree can be renamed as PromotionalEvents

PromotionalSpecificationType.description: A class to describe a promotional event as a set of item locations that share a set of promotional tactics.

PropertyIdentificationType.description: A class for assigning identifying information for a property

PurchaseReceiptLineType.description: A class to define a line item in a purchase receipt.

PurchaseReferenceType.description: A class for referencing an object to which a purchase relates, such as a subscription number, telephone number, meter, vehicle, person, etc.

QualificationResolutionType.description: A class to describe the acceptance or rejection of an economic operator in a tendering process.

QualifyingPartyType.description: A class to describe the distinctive features or characteristics qualifying an economic operator to be a party in a tendering process (e.g., number of employees, number of operating units, type of business, technical and financial capabilities, completed projects).

QuotationLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Quotation.

RadioactiveIsotopeType.description: A class defining the maximum activity of the radioactive contents capable of sustaining a nuclear fission chain reaction during carriage.

RadioactiveMaterialType.description: A class defining a radioactive material.

RailTransportType.description: A class defining details about a train wagon used as a means of transport.

ReceiptLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Receipt Advice.

RegulationType.description: A class to describe a regulation.

RelatedItemType.description: A class to describe the relationship to an item different from the item associated with the item line in which RelatedItem is used.

ReminderLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Reminder document.

RemittanceAdviceLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Remittance Advice.

RenewalType.description: A class to describe the renewal of a commercial arrangement, such as a contract or licence fee.

RequestForQuotationLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Request for Quotation.

RequestForTenderLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Request for Tender describing an item of goods or a service solicited in the Request for Tender.

RequestedTenderTotalType.description: A class defining budgeted monetary amounts.

ResourceConsumptionType.description: A class to describe the type and amount of resources consumed during a product’s lifecycle, including information about source and timing.

ResponseType.description: A class to describe an application-level response to a document.

ResponseValueType.description: A class to describe the criterion requirement response value.

ResultOfVerificationType.description: A class to describe the result of an attempt to verify a signature.

RetailPlannedImpactType.description: A class to describe a planned effect of a retail event (e.g., a promotion or a change in inventory policy) upon supply or demand.

RoadTransportType.description: A class for identifying a vehicle used for road transport.

SalesItemType.description: A class to describe information related to an item in a sales context

SanitaryMeasureType.description: A class describing a plan, action or meassure that has been implemented for sanitary reasons.

ScoreType.description: A class to describe an assigned numeric or qualitative score using a recognized scoring system.

SecondaryHazardType.description: A class to describe a secondary hazard associated with a hazardous item.

SecurityClearanceTermType.description: A class to specify security clearance terms.

SecurityListingType.description: A class to describe a financial security listed on a regulated market.

SecurityMeasureType.description: A class to describe a security measure

ServiceFrequencyType.description: A class to specify which day of the week a transport service is operational.

ServiceLevelAgreementType.description: A class to describe a service level agreement which regulates the quality, availability and responsibilities of digital services.

ServiceProviderPartyType.description: A class to describe a party contracting to provide services, such as transportation, finance, etc.

ShareholderPartyType.description: A class to describe a Party that owns shares or equity.

ShipRequirementType.description: A class to describe a requirement for a ship

ShipStoreArticleType.description: An article in the ship's stores during a shipment stage.

ShipToShipActivityRecordType.description: A class to describe a ship to ship activity record.

ShipmentStageType.description: A class to describe one stage of movement in a transport of goods.

ShipmentType.description: A class defining an identifiable collection of one or more goods items to be transported between the seller party and the buyer party. This information may be defined within a commercial contract. A shipment can be transported in different consignments (e.g., split for logistical purposes).

SignatureType.description: A class to define a signature.

SocialMediaProfileType.description: A class to describe a social media profile.

StatementLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Statement of account.

StatusType.description: A class to describe the condition or position of an object.

StockAvailabilityReportLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Stock Availability Report describing the availability of an item of sale.

StorageType.description: A class to describe a storage and storage requirements

StowageType.description: A class to describe a location on board a means of transport where specified goods or transport equipment have been stowed or are to be stowed.

SubcontractTermsType.description: A class to describe subcontract terms for a tendering process.

SubscriberConsumptionType.description: The consumption for a specific party for given consumption point provided by a numbers of suppliers. An enterprise can have one utility statement for several parties (e.g. a ministry of defence receiving a telephone bill). In this way each subscriber consumption represent a sub utility statement.

SupplierConsumptionType.description: The consumption in case the consumption is for one and only one supplier.

SupplierPartyType.description: A class to describe a supplier party.

TaxCategoryType.description: A class to describe one of the tax categories within a taxation scheme (e.g., High Rate VAT, Low Rate VAT).

TaxSchemeType.description: A class to describe a taxation scheme (e.g., VAT, State tax, County tax).

TaxSubtotalType.description: A class to define the subtotal for a particular tax category within a particular taxation scheme, such as standard rate within VAT.

TaxTotalType.description: A class to describe the total tax for a particular taxation scheme.

TelecommunicationsServiceType.description: A class to describe a telecommunications service (e.g., a telephone call or a video on demand service).

TelecommunicationsSupplyLineType.description: A class that outlines the telecommunication supply in details

TelecommunicationsSupplyType.description: A class describing the supply of a telecommunication service, e.g., providing telephone calls.

TemperatureType.description: A class to describe a measurement of temperature.

TenderLineType.description: A class to define a line in a Tender.

TenderPreparationType.description: A class to describe directions for preparing a tender.

TenderRequirementType.description: A template for a required document in a tendering process.

TenderResultType.description: A class to describe the awarding of a tender in a tendering process.

TenderedProjectType.description: A class to describe a tendered project or project lot.

TendererPartyQualificationType.description: A class to describe the qualifications of a tenderer party.

TendererQualificationRequestType.description: The evaluation that the Contracting Authority party requests to fulfill to the tenderers.

TendererRequirementType.description: A class to describe an action or statement required of an economic operator participating in a tendering process.

TenderingCriterionPropertyGroupType.description: A class to describe a group of tendering criteria

TenderingCriterionPropertyType.description: A class to describe the criterion properties.

TenderingCriterionResponseType.description: A class to describe a response to a criterion property.

TenderingCriterionType.description: A class to describe an item of criterion support for representations of capabilities or the ability to meet tendering requirements, which an economic operator must provide for acceptance into a tendering process.

TenderingProcessType.description: A class to describe the process of a formal offer and response to execute work or supply goods at a stated price.

TenderingTermsType.description: A class to describe tendering terms for a tendering process.

TradeFinancingType.description: A class to describe a trade financing instrument.

TradingTermsType.description: A class for describing the terms of a trade agreement.

TransactionConditionsType.description: A class to describe purchasing, sales, or payment conditions.

TransportEquipmentSealType.description: A class to describe a device (a transport equipment seal) for securing the doors of a shipping container.

TransportEquipmentType.description: A class to describe a piece of equipment used to transport goods.

TransportEventType.description: A class to describe a significant occurrence or happening related to the transportation of goods.

TransportExecutionTermsType.description: A class to describe terms applying to a transport execution plan.

TransportHandlingUnitType.description: A class to describe a uniquely identifiable unit consisting of one or more packages, goods items, or pieces of transport equipment.

TransportMeansType.description: A class to describe a particular vehicle or vessel used for the conveyance of goods or persons.

TransportScheduleType.description: Describes the location and schedule relating to a transport means.

TransportationSegmentType.description: A class to describe one segment or leg in a transportation service.

TransportationServiceType.description: A class to describe a transportation service.

UnstructuredPriceType.description: A simplified version of the Price class intended for applications such as telephone billing.

UtilityItemType.description: A class to describe the consumption of a utility product.

VerifiedGrossMassType.description: A class to describe a verified gross mass (VGM) measure and its documentation.

VesselDynamicsType.description: A class to describe the dynamics of a vesssel.

WHOAffectedAreaVisitType.description: A class to describe a visit to a port located in a geographical area considered an “affected area” by the World Health Organization (WHO).

WasteGeneratedType.description: A class to describe a quantity of waste generated by an item, process, or activity, including type, quantity, and optional lifecycle context.

WebSiteAccessType.description: A class to describe access to a web site.

WebSiteType.description: A class to describe a web site.

WinningPartyType.description: A party that is identified as the awarded by a tender result.

WorkPhaseReferenceType.description: A class that refers to a phase of work. Used for instance to specify what part of the contract the billing is referring to.

WorkQuantityTotalType.description: A class to define a document-level total of reported work expressed as a quantity.

WorkReportLineType.description: A class to describe a line in a Work Report, specifying the work performed.
